scripts.docs:build: npx documentation build ./index.js -f md -o my-docs/docs/functions/global.md --shallow && npx documentation build ./modules/telegram_connect.js -f md -o my-docs/docs/functions/telegramAPI.md --shallow && npx documentation build ./modules/ya_request.js -f md -o my-docs/docs/functions/yandexAPI.md --shallow
scripts.docker:dev: docker run -d -p 3002:3002 -v ./error.log:/app/error.log -v ./data.json:/app/data.json -v ./.env.development:/app/.env.development -e NODE_ENV=development -e DOTENV_CONFIG_PATH=.env.development --name ya_bot artemvoronweb/ya_bot
